picks.title: Director, Partner Sales - Enterprise
picks.snippet: Job Title: Director, Partner Sales - Enterprise  Location: This is a fully remote opportunity and can be worked from any location in the United States. ABOUT THE COMPANY: Clari + Salesloft are building the next era of enterprise revenue — one where teams make confident decisions powered by AI and real signals. By combining our scale, insights, and AI innovation, we’re building the industry’s first Predictive Revenue System , enabling humans and AI to work together to make smarter decisions
